prompt: Create an ultra-detailed retro Japanese anime portrait inspired by classic 1980s cel animation and city-pop aesthetics. Depict a young woman with porcelain skin, expressive warm brown anime eyes, a short feathered black bob with wispy bangs, and soft coral lips. She wears vibrant coral-red wired over-ear headphones and a relaxed white cotton button-up shirt. Her head is slightly turned as if listening deeply to music, with a calm, reflective expression. Illuminate the scene using dramatic golden-hour sunlight from one side balanced by cool blue ambient skylight, creating cinematic shadows and warm facial highlights. Place her against a simple gradient sky-blue background. Render with authentic vintage cel animation linework, smooth painted shading, subtle film grain, soft bloom, nostalgic color grading, and ultra-high-resolution remastered anime quality.
